content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -1.07%, Bank Nifty -1.21%, VIX +9.14% to 18.38 — risk-off session with broad weakness. Pharma (+0.68%) and IT (+0.29%) are the only green sectors; FMCG showing defensive bid intraday. Existing book is well-positioned with defensive tilt (FMCG, Pharma, IT) and several positions in profit. Priority is trailing SLs on winners, not new admits — but pharma momentum (LAURUSLABS, WOCKPHARMA) and FMCG (MARICO, TATACONSUM at 52w highs) deserve TRAIL_SL discipline.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24100
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held at -1.1%, CMP 123.68 vs SL 121.00 (2.2% room). Safe-haven thesis intact on VIX spike +9%. SL placement is correct; no trail needed yet as position is slightly in loss. Hold to SL or target 135."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 828.00,
      "new_target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held at +2.6%, CMP 841.25. Existing SL already at 828 (entry breakeven +1%) — meets Rule (a) of trailing mandate. No-op MODIFY would be wasted; checking if CMP-to-SL gap allows further trail. Gap is 1.6% — at the 1% floor, can trail to ~833. However original SL 828 is fine, let position run. HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Overriding above MODIFY — current SL 828 is already at +1% above entry (breakeven+), satisfies trailing mandate (a). CMP 841.25 gives 1.6% gap to SL. FMCG defensive bid intact, Q4 beat +22% revenue, target 855 within reach. Bullish research modifier +0.10. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1357.20,
      "new_target": 1420.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held at +9.8%, CMP 1382.90, SL 1357.20 (already trailed to lock ~7.8% gain — meets Rule (b) trailing mandate). CMP-to-SL gap = 1.86%, comfortably above 1% floor. Target 1420 close to today's high 1387.80. Cigniti merger record May 16 + brokerage PTs Rs 1,430-2,020 support runway. Holding SL/target — this is a no-op, switch to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Replacing above MODIFY (no-op). SL 1357.20 locks in +7.8% of the 9.8% gain, gap to CMP is 1.86% (above 1% floor — safe trail). Target 1420 intact with brokerage tailwinds. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held at -3.1%, CMP 1443.70 vs SL 1465.00 — wait, SL 1465 is ABOVE CMP 1443.70? Re-reading: SL 1465.00, CMP 1443.80. SL is 21pts ABOVE CMP, meaning this SL has effectively been BREACHED already and position should have stopped. Actually no — for a long, SL is BELOW entry; entry 1490, SL 1465 means -1.7% stopout. CMP 1443.80 has BROKEN below SL. Position is past stop. EXIT."
    },
    {
      "action": "EXIT",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 33,
      "order_type": "MARKET",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Overriding HOLD above. Stored SL 1465.00; CMP 1443.80 is 21 points BELOW SL — SL has been breached. Q4 was strong (+37% PAT) but valuation premium (P/E 64x) and broader market risk-off has caught up. Exit at market, lock the -3.1% loss now since SL has already been violated by tape. Realized loss ~ -₹1,530."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1630.00,
      "new_target": 1740.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held at +2.1%, CMP 1652.00 (data shows 1656.40 intraday). SL 1618 = entry breakeven. Per trailing mandate (a) +2% triggers SL-to-entry — already done. CMP-to-SL gap of 2.1% allows tightening to 1630 (1.6% gap, above 1% floor) to lock small gain. Pharma sector +0.68%, Q4 EBITDA +148% YoY, biotech ramp. Target 1740 intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held at +0.5%, CMP 2799.30 vs SL 2760 (1.4% gap). P&L below +2% trailing trigger. Q4 PAT +10.6%, FY26 +46.7%, Odisha capex. Specialty chem sector trough but SRF diversified. Hold to target 2920."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held at -0.1%, CMP 9091 vs SL 8950 (1.5% gap), entry 9100. Position essentially flat. 3.3x volume surge is bullish, brokerage PTs Rs 9,770-10,500. Capital Goods sector weak but POLYCAB outperforming. Hold to SL/target 9550."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held at -1.6%, CMP 10585 vs SL 10440 (1.4% gap). Auto sector -1.56% today — weakest sector. Q4 standalone +34%, buyback at Rs 12,000 = 15% premium acts as floor, record date May 29. Thesis intact; SL room sufficient to absorb auto-sector chop. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held at -1.7%, CMP 478.65 vs SL 468.00 (2.3% gap). FMCG defensive bid intact, Q4 PAT +15.75%, quick-commerce +54%. SL placement sufficient. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1250.00,
      "new_target": 1320.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held at +3.5%, CMP 1269.10, current SL 1240 (entry 1226 + ~1.1%). Per trail mandate (b) at +3.5% should move SL toward max(entry, last-2%×last) = max(1226, 1243.7) = 1243.7. Current SL 1240 essentially there; tightening to 1250 (1.5% below CMP — above 1% floor) locks +2% gain. Target raised to 1320 — stock at ATH 1265.90, pharma sector +0.68%, FDA audit cleared, CDMO ramp. R:R from new entry not applicable (position management)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TATACONSUM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held at -2.5%, CMP 1216.60 vs SL 1198 (1.5% gap). Was top gainer +6% earlier today (high 1253.60), faded to 1221. FMCG Q4 PAT +21.5%, India UVG 16%. SL room sufficient; thesis intact. Hold — do not panic-close on intraday fade per Rule 17."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "CGPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 850.00,
      "new_target": 920.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held at +0.3%, CMP 864.55 (intraday high 886.80). Below +2% trail trigger but volume surge 3.2x and 5-day winning streak suggest momentum intact. Q4 PAT +32%, order backlog +61%. Tightening SL from 838 to 850 (1.7% below CMP — above 1% floor) reduces risk while position consolidates near 52w high. Target 920 unchanged."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HCLTECH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "IT sector defensive bid but HCLTECH near 52w low — catching-knife setup on risk-off day with VIX +9%. Already have COFORGE for IT exposure. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "DRREDDY",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.3,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 results TOMORROW May 12 — binary event in 1 session. Goldman Sell downgrade Apr 23, near 52w low. Rule 11 + bearish research modifier -0.12 = NO_ACTION."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Already held; no fresh add. Position management handled in MODIFY above."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "TATACONSUM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Already held; +6% gap-up faded back to entry zone. No fresh add when position is at -2.5%."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {"symbol": "GOLDBEES", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 121 with 2.2% room, safe-haven thesis intact on VIX spike."},
    {"symbol": "MARICO", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 828 already at +1% breakeven, gap 1.6% to CMP — adequate trail in place."},
    {"symbol": "COFORGE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 1357.20 locks +7.8%, 1.86% to CMP — well-placed trail."},
    {"symbol": "PIDILITIND", "current_action": "EXIT", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 1465 breached by CMP 1443.80, exit at market."},
    {"symbol": "WOCKPHARMA", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 1630.00, "reasoning": "+2.1% gain, tighten SL from entry 1618 to 1630 (1.6% gap, above floor)."},
    {"symbol": "SRF", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "+0.5%, below trail trigger, SL room sufficient."},
    {"symbol": "POLYCAB", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Flat, 1.5% SL gap, 3.3x volume bullish."},
    {"symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "-1.6%, buyback floor at Rs 12,000 supportive, SL room intact."},
    {"symbol": "DABUR", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "-1.7%, 2.3% SL room, FMCG defensive."},
    {"symbol": "LAURUSLABS", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 1250.00, "reasoning": "+3.5% gain at ATH, tighten SL to 1250 to lock +2%."},
    {"symbol": "TATACONSUM", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Intraday fade from +6% high, do not panic-exit, SL room 1.5%."},
    {"symbol": "CGPOWER", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 850.00, "reasoning": "Momentum + volume surge, tighten SL from 838 to 850 (1.7% gap)."}
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "PIDILITIND being exited on SL breach. Watch DRREDDY post-May-12 results for clean re-entry. HFCL pending BUY 600x @ 133.50 has been open 7586m (5+ days) — should be CANCELed but symbol not in deep-dive batch this cycle; flag for next pulse. Pharma momentum (LAURUS, WOCK, SUNPHARMA) is strongest theme; already exposed via 2 names. FMCG (MARICO, TATACONSUM, DABUR) also well-covered. No qualifying new BUY today given risk-off tape + VIX spike — disposition is risk-managment-first per Rule 18 with explicit per-name rejects: HCLTECH (catching knife), DRREDDY (binary tomorrow), LAURUS/TATACONSUM (already held).",
  "portfolio_notes": "Deployment 50%, cash 50% — below 80% soft target but justified given VIX +9% spike, risk-off tape (Nifty -1.07%, Bank Nifty -1.21%), and book already carrying 12 positions with adequate sector diversification (FMCG, Pharma, IT, Auto, Chemicals, Capital Goods, Gold). Realized today +₹4,106; unrealized +₹2,631. PIDILITIND exit clears a -3.1% drag and frees ~₹48K capital. Trailing SLs being implemented on WOCK, LAURUS, CGPOWER per mandate. Book is defensively positioned for risk-off; new admits would be poor risk-reward today."
}
